self.name: Template: Create and Activate a Certification Campaign

object.name: Template: Create and Activate a Certification Campaign
object.description: Create and activate a certification campaign for every identity that has changed departments.

Compare Strings.description: Only create the campaign for identities who change departments.  This doesn't look for a specific department.

Create Certification Campaign.description: Create an identity certification campaign any identity that changed departments.  Name it after the identity so we know who is being certified.

Get Identity.description: Get the identity's attributes so we can look up their manager.

Get Identity 2.description: This node is used to gather information about the user's manager to populate their email.

attributes.body:
Dear ${recipName},

This notification is to inform you that ${displayName} has recently changed departments.


A Certification campaign named ${campaignName} has been generated for your review.


Thank you
Security & Compliance
attributes.subject: Direct Report department change

Send Email 1.description: Send an email to the identity's manager so they know there is a certification campaign pending for their employee that they need to complete.

success.description: Don't do anything else, since the identity didn't change departments.
